prompt: Create a streaming chat completion example using @ahoo-wang/fetcher-openai with GPT-4. The script should stream responses in real-time and display each chunk of content as it arrives. Use the eventstream package integration for streaming support. Set up the client and stream a message asking for a short poem about coding.
assertions: Creates a .ts or .js file that imports OpenAI from @ahoo-wang/fetcher-openai
Uses stream: true option in chat.completions() call
Uses for-await-of loop to iterate over streaming chunks
Displays content from each chunk's choices[0].delta.content in real-time
Checks for finish_reason to detect stream completion
